# Ultima busqueda SERP

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->
<!-- Source: qpx-dnq-qqs.json -->
## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://es.stayforlong.com/
2. Close exclusive offers popup
3. Type 'HOTEL DELFIN TOSSA' in travel destination field
4. Click Hotel Delfín Tossa search result
5. Click Buscar search button
6. Click responsive brand logo
7. Close exclusive offers popup
8. Click travel destination input field
9. Click Hotel Delfín Tossa search result
10. Click Buscar search link
